caption: A man with a shaved head and a dark beard is recorded in a studio with a black, textured acoustic foam wall in the background. He wears black over-ear headphones and a plain white t-shirt, with visible tattoos on his right arm. A professional microphone, labeled "Shure SM7B," is positioned on a boom arm in front of him. He is speaking, and his facial expressions shift as he communicates. Initially, he raises his right hand in a gesturing motion toward his face, but by the subsequent frames, his hand has lowered and moved out of view. His mouth remains open in mid-speech throughout the sequence, and he maintains a focused gaze directed toward someone or something off-screen to his left.
